posts.text:
Kara Swisher interviews Epstein survivors in a stunning podcast. 

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Such strong women with compelling stories.

podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/o...
Maybe just me with three stellar sons but women have been helping boys forever and pretty fucking well www.wsj.com/health/welln...
Yes these people need to get a life www.wsj.com/tech/ai/ai-b...

Going to be talking to @rivianofficial onstage @sxsw about this cool EV that I might just have to buy and not just because it is not a Cybertruck. Though it is definitely not a Cybertruck which soiled the Austin scene last year youtube.com/watch?v=1YV3...

I’ll be interviewing the folks who made the upcoming show, The Audacity, on AMC @sxsw.com for @onwithkaraswisher.bsky.social episode: Silicon Valley’s Image Takes a Dark Turn in Pop Culture www.nytimes.com/2026/03/12/t...
Oh hi. I emerge from my crypt on April 11: youtu.be/L2pE0702tvk?...
As @profgalloway.com says: he is the speaker of the (white) house and not the people’s house.
Def get with anything @annelamott.bsky.social says about writing .
Grifty moves by a grifty man: Elon Musk’s Secret Web of Companies in Texas www.nytimes.com/2026/02/27/t...

“Mr. Trump’s approach to Iran is reckless. His goals are ill-defined. He has failed to line up the international and domestic support that would be necessary to maximize the chances of a successful outcome. He has disregarded both domestic and international law for warfare.”
Every word of this: “Why Have You Started This War, Mr. President? www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/o...

The oily involvement in politics by toxic tech figures like David Sacks, Peter Thiel and Marc Andreessen will make our country much less safe: OpenAI Reaches A.I. Agreement With Defense Dept. After Anthropic Clash www.nytimes.com/2026/02/27/t...
This is Trump's former AI adviser

You know, it's funny. Earlier this week I had started to write a follow up to my "Fascism For First Time Founders" post that tried to explain to Silicon Valley how embracing fascists would destroy innovation... but now I need to spend the weekend rewriting the whole thing with a new Exhibit A.
Either Altman is lying in this story, or the Anthropic ban was completely pointless.

“if you won’t let us use your product to spy on Americans and kill without supervision we will single-handedly destroy your business by fiat” is the single most authoritarian anti-business action I can ever remember any administration taking
